response.justification: The candidate is a strong, versatile senior individual contributor with genuine distributed-systems depth and recent exposure to agentic tooling, but the role is an executive CTO position with hard requirements this resume does not meet: there is no senior technical leadership experience, no track record scaling teams from 10 to 30+, no production multi-agent AI systems ownership, and no experience operating AI in regulated financial environments. Fintech exposure is limited to roughly one year at RIDE Capital in an IC capacity.
strengths: Solid backend and low-latency distributed-systems experience, including microservices handling millions of requests per second
Recent hands-on work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at Naver
Long, polyglot engineering track record with open-source project ownership and strong craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD)
concerns: No engineering leadership, people management, or team-scaling experience — entire career is in IC roles
No demonstrated production multi-agent AI systems or AI operation in regulated, high-stakes environments
No evidence of executive-level scope: board communication, outsourced-engineering governance, or organizational design

key_factors.factor: Missing senior leadership and team-scaling track record
No production multi-agent AI systems in regulated settings
Strong distributed-systems and backend engineering depth
